offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: inefficient reconciliation of accounts receivable and payable
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools discussions
try_it: Let users try manual entry for invoice data and reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
